title: senecio myriocephalus
intro: Senecio myriocephalus, also known as False Flax or Woolly Groundsel, is a flowering plant species belonging to the daisy family (Asteraceae). The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Senecio myriocephalus include its ability to soothe skin irritations and wounds, reduce fever, and provide relief from respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. The plant is often prepared in herbal tea form, as well as being infused in oil for topical applications, although further research is necessary to confirm its efficacy and safety.
